requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and AGANOR Conformity as Technical Baseline for Gabon BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及AGANOR合格评定作为加蓬BESS项目验收技术基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及AGANOR合格評定作為加彭BESS項目驗收技術基準

summary.en: Gabon does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a pre-shipment certificate of conformity (CoC) obligation or a statutory technical regulation specifically mandating IEC 62619 compliance for stationary battery energy storage imports. AGANOR (Agence Gabonaise de Normalisation), established under Gabon's national standards law, serves as the national standards body and may adopt IEC standards by reference, including IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications). However, a confirmed mandatory AGANOR technical regulation requiring pre-shipment IEC 62619 conformity for BESS imports had not been identified from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. The operative safety requirement for most utility-scale and commercial BESS projects in Gabon is contractual: donor-financed (AfDB, World Bank, EU) and lender-backed projects routinely require IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as a mandatory technical prerequisite in project specifications, equipment supply contracts, and insurance conditions. Exporters should verify the current AGANOR regulated-product list and any applicable pre-shipment conformity obligations directly with AGANOR before shipment.
summary.zh: 加蓬目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与装运前合格证书（CoC）义务或专门强制固定式储能电池进口遵守IEC 62619的法定技术法规相当。AGANOR（加蓬标准化局）依据加蓬国家标准法成立，作为国家标准机构，可通过引用方式采纳包括IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）在内的IEC标准。然而，截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源识别到AGANOR确认强制要求BESS进口装运前IEC 62619合格评定的技术法规。加蓬大多数公用事业规模和商业BESS项目的实际安全要求是合同性的：捐助方资助（非行、世行、欧盟）和贷款方支持的项目，通常在项目规格、设备供应合同和保险条件中将IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据作为强制性技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向AGANOR核实现行受监管产品清单及任何适用的装运前合格义务。
summary.zht: 加彭目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與裝運前合格證書（CoC）義務或專門強制固定式儲能電池進口遵守IEC 62619的法定技術法規相當。AGANOR（加彭標準化局）依據加彭國家標準法成立，作為國家標準機構，可通過引用方式採納包括IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）在內的IEC標準。然而，截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源識別到AGANOR確認強制要求BESS進口裝運前IEC 62619合格評定的技術法規。加彭大多數公用事業規模和商業BESS項目的實際安全要求是合同性的：捐助方資助（非行、世行、歐盟）和貸款方支持的項目，通常在項目規格、設備供應合同和保險條件中將IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據作為強制性技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向AGANOR核實現行受監管產品清單及任何適用的裝運前合格義務。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; routinely required in donor/lender-financed Gabon project specifications)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may be referenced for smaller modular BESS systems)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard referenced in AfDB, World Bank, EU project specifications)

AGANOR — Agence Gabonaise de Normalisation (Gabon national standards body; verify current regulated-product list and any mandatory pre-shipment conformity requirements directly — no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific regulation as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Gabon project specifications, donor/lender technical requirements, or insurance conditions. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance — a Chinese GB certificate alone is insufficient for Gabon donor-financed or lender-backed BESS project acceptance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被加蓬项目规格、捐助方/贷款方技术要求或保险条件接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书——仅持有中国GB证书不足以满足加蓬捐助方资助或贷款方支持的BESS项目验收要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被加彭項目規格、捐助方/貸款方技術要求或保險條件接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書——僅持有中國GB證書不足以滿足加彭捐助方資助或貸款方支持的BESS項目驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Gap: While no confirmed standalone mandatory pre-shipment CoC obligation for BESS imports has been identified in Gabon, IEC 62619 is the operative technical safety requirement in practice for donor-financed and lender-backed BESS projects — which represent the majority of utility-scale and C&I storage deployments in Gabon. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 in project technical specifications, insurance assessments, or lender due diligence. Exporters should: (a) verify the current AGANOR regulated-product list and any applicable pre-shipment conformity obligation for lithium BESS cells before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules supplied to Gabon BESS projects; (c) confirm whether the applicable IEC 62619 edition is the 2017 or 2022 version as specified in the project technical specification or lender requirement; (d) retain IEC 62619 test documentation in French (or ensure French translation is available) given Gabon's official language and the francophone regulatory context; (e) confirm insurance and warranty terms — international BESS project insurers operating in Gabon routinely require IEC 62619 evidence as a minimum condition.
gap.zh: 差距：尽管加蓬尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS进口装运前CoC义务，但IEC 62619在实践中是捐助方资助和贷款方支持的BESS项目的实际技术安全要求——这代表了加蓬大多数公用事业规模和工商业储能部署。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被项目技术规格、保险评估或贷款方尽职调查接受为IEC 62619的替代依据。出口商应：（a）在出货前核实AGANOR现行受监管产品清单及任何适用于锂BESS电芯的装运前合格义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至加蓬BESS项目的所有电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）确认适用的IEC 62619版本为项目技术规格或贷款方要求中规定的2017版还是2022版；（d）鉴于加蓬官方语言及法语监管背景，以法语保存IEC 62619测试文件（或确保提供法语译本）；（e）确认保险和保修条款——在加蓬运营的国际BESS项目保险方通常将IEC 62619证据作为最低条件。
gap.zht: 差距：儘管加彭尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS進口裝運前CoC義務，但IEC 62619在實踐中是捐助方資助和貸款方支持的BESS項目的實際技術安全要求——這代表了加彭大多數公用事業規模和工商業儲能部署。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被項目技術規格、保險評估或貸款方盡職調查接受為IEC 62619的替代依據。出口商應：（a）在出貨前核實AGANOR現行受監管產品清單及任何適用於鋰BESS電芯的裝運前合格義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至加彭BESS項目的所有電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）確認適用的IEC 62619版本為項目技術規格或貸款方要求中規定的2017版還是2022版；（d）鑑於加彭官方語言及法語監管背景，以法語保存IEC 62619測試文件（或確保提供法語譯本）；（e）確認保險和保修條款——在加彭運營的國際BESS項目保險方通常將IEC 62619證據作為最低條件。

mandatory_status.target: Effectively mandatory in donor/lender-financed projects where AfDB, World Bank, or EU technical specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; AGANOR mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with AGANOR
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Gabon as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the effectively mandatory technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in donor- and lender-financed Gabon project specifications, insurance conditions, and lender due diligence. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Gabon project acceptance in donor-financed contexts. Verify AGANOR current regulated-product scope; obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; prepare French-language documentation where required by the francophone regulatory context. Confirm insurance and lender technical requirements before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，加蓬尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619在捐助方和贷款方资助的加蓬项目规格、保险条件及贷款方尽职调查中，实际上是BESS电芯和模组安全的强制性技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证，不足以满足捐助方资助背景下的加蓬项目验收要求。核实AGANOR现行受监管产品范围；从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书；在法语监管背景要求时准备法语文件。在设备采购最终确定前确认保险和贷款方技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，加彭尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619在捐助方和貸款方資助的加彭項目規格、保險條件及貸款方盡職調查中，實際上是BESS電芯和模組安全的強制性技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證，不足以滿足捐助方資助背景下的加彭項目驗收要求。核實AGANOR現行受監管產品範圍；從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書；在法語監管背景要求時準備法語文件。在設備採購最終確定前確認保險和貸款方技術要求。
